name: canshare-who-soft-tissue-site-histology
title: NZ WHO soft tissue site histology
description: Histologies used for soft tissue sites, from WHO Classification of Tumours, Soft Tissue & Bone Tumours (latest edition) - 2. Soft tissue tumours, 3. Undifferentiated small round cell sarcomas of bone and soft tissue or an 'Other' value.
